execution_summary: The Docker environment was generated, built, and run successfully. The replication_analysis.py script located the FinalData.csv dataset, computed descriptive statistics, and performed the preregistered two-sided Mann-Whitney U-test comparing first-stage effort (effort_t1) between treatments. The analysis executed without errors and saved replication_results.json. Results show no statistically significant difference and the observed mean direction is opposite to the preregistered expectation.

code_executed.logs: Using dataset at /app/data/FinalData.csv; OS n=156 mean=82.88 median=90; TS n=156 mean=78.49 median=80.5; Mann-Whitney U=11022.5, p=0.1505; results saved.
code_executed.environment: Python 3.10 with pandas 1.5+, scipy 1.9+, numpy 1.23+ running in Debian-based slim container

results.hypothesis_tested: Participants assigned to the two-stage tournament (treat = 2) will exert higher first-stage effort (effort_t1) than participants assigned to the one-stage tournament (treat = 1).

findings_summary.outcome_name: Mann-Whitney U statistic for effort_t1 (TS vs OS)
